messages.task.failed.en_US: The system is busy, please try again later

messages.context_window_exceeded.zh_CN: 当前对话上下文已过长，请点击输入框右侧的上下文占比圆环，在弹出的面板中选择“压缩上下文”后再继续。
messages.context_window_exceeded.en_US: The conversation context is too long. Click the context usage ring on the right side of the input box, choose "Compact Context" from the panel, and then continue.

agent_profile.desc_with_role.en_US: Your name is {name}, you are a {role}. {description}

cron.notify.intro.zh_CN: 以下定时提醒刚刚触发。请保持你当前的人设和说话风格，直接通知用户。根据任务内容组织语言，可以带点关怀或实用提示，让回复自然、有温度。不要讨论调度机制、执行细节，或 AI 能做什么不能做什么。
cron.notify.intro.en_US: The following scheduled reminder(s) have just fired. Stay in your current persona and speaking style, and notify the user directly. Shape your reply around the task content; feel free to add a touch of care or a helpful nudge. Do NOT discuss scheduling mechanics, execution details, or what AI can or cannot do.
